creator: wkoszek@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

Something is wrong with 'pkg' in 10.2. I've started a VPS on DigitalOcean; the cheapest $5/month one. With plain FreeBSD 10.2, right after logging in I typed:

sudo pkg install vim

Output:

Processing ....
pkg: Skipping unknown key 'messages'

[[long...output]]

Processing entries:  85%
pkg: Skipping unknown key 'messages'

Processing entries:  85%

It seems to have worked, but it looks like something is wrong. I reinstalled FreeBSD 2x and it's reproducible.

Wojciech
